s: This app invites you to relive the nostalgic curated sets of DJ Edertech.
d:
This app invites you to relive the curated DJ sets of DJ Edertech, a devoted enthusiast of old-school music.

Immerse yourself in the nostalgic beats spanning various music genres, including techno, house, breakbeat, jungle/drum & bass, synth-pop, industrial, rock, soul, disco, funk, and more.

DJ Edertech, a DJ since 1989 and a skilled Software Developer, is the mastermind behind this app. Browse the latest sets directly from the DJ Edertech YouTube channel, filter by title, and open any set in the YouTube app with a single tap.

- Browse the latest DJ sets from the YouTube channel feed.
- Filter sets by title to find what you are looking for.
- Tap any set to open and play it directly in the YouTube app.
- Switch between light and dark themes.
